title: Distant Journey
writer: Erik Kolár, Mojmir Drvota, Alfréd Radok
actors: Blanka Waleská, Otomar Krejca, Viktor Ocásek
plot: The terrible effect of the Nazis upon a single Jewish family provides the basis for this drama. The family cannot handle the strain and gradually breaks up. Interspliced within the film are newsreel clips of angry crowds, and scen...
